---
title: "A | CFA Live"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## 3-Faktor-CFA 
 


```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")

library(mnormt)
library(lavaan)                

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")

model_3f <-  "visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
              textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
              speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9"

fit_3f <- cfa(model_3f, data = HolzingerSwineford1939)

library(lavaanPlot)
```


```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
library(lavaan)
model_3f <-  "visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
              textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
              speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9"
fit_3f <- cfa(model_3f, data = HolzingerSwineford1939)
summary(fit_3f)
```

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
# Standardisierte Lösung
standardizedSolution(fit_3f)[1:9, 
            c("lhs","op","rhs","est.std")]
```



```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(lavaanPlot)
lavaanPlot(model = fit_3f,  
     node_options = list(shape = "box", fontname = "Helvetica"), 
     edge_options = list(color = "grey"), 
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE)
```

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(tidySEM)
graph_sem(fit_3f)
```
